specs.title: Navigating to / renders a list of all notes stored in the database
Each note entry displays its title so the note is identifiable at a glance
Pinned notes are displayed with a visible pinned indicator
Notes are ordered: pinned notes first, then un-pinned notes
Each note card/row is a tappable link that navigates to /notes/[id]/edit
A 'New note' button / link pointing to /notes/new is always visible

suites.title: US-0.2 — See the Empty State When No Notes Exist

specs.title: The list page renders 'No notes yet' or similar when no notes exist
The empty state includes a 'New note' button or link to /notes/new

suites.title: US-2.1 — Create a New Note with Title and Body

specs.title: Navigating to /notes/new renders a form with title input, body textarea, pinned checkbox, and submit button
Filling title = 'Groceries' and body = 'milk, eggs' and submitting calls POST /api/notes
On 201 response, the browser redirects to / where the new 'Groceries' note is visible
Checking the pinned checkbox and submitting sends pinned: true in the POST /api/notes request
After redirect to /, the new pinned note appears in the pinned section

suites.title: US-2.3 — Block Submission When Title Is Empty

specs.title: If the title input is empty on submit, no API call is made
An inline validation message 'Title is required' is displayed
The form stays on screen with all other field values intact

suites.title: US-3.1 — Open a Note and See Its Current Values Pre-filled

specs.title: Clicking a note card on / navigates to /notes/[id]/edit
The title input is pre-filled with the note's current title
The body textarea is pre-filled with the note's current body
The pinned checkbox is checked if note.pinned === true

suites.title: US-3.2 — Save an Edited Note and See the Updated Title in the List

specs.title: Changing the title value and clicking Save calls PUT /api/notes/[id]
On 200 response, the browser redirects to /
The note card on the list shows the updated title

suites.title: US-3.4 — See Not-Found State for a Missing Note

specs.title: Navigating to /notes/99999999/edit renders a not-found message: 'Note not found.'
A link back to / is provided on the not-found page

suites.title: US-4.1 — Delete a Note with Confirmation

specs.title: A Delete button is visible on /notes/[id]/edit
Clicking Delete triggers a confirmation step before any API call is made
Confirming deletion calls DELETE /api/notes/[id] and on 204 response redirects to /
The deleted note no longer appears in the list after redirect
Cancelling the confirmation returns the form to its normal state

suites.title: US-1.1 — Filter Notes by Partial Title

specs.title: A search input is rendered at the top of the list view /
Typing characters into the search input narrows the list to matching notes
Clearing the search input restores the full unfiltered list

suites.title: US-5.1 — Retrieve All Notes via API

specs.title: GET /api/notes returns HTTP 200 with Content-Type: application/json
The response body is a JSON array of Note objects
GET /api/notes?q=<string> returns only matching notes

suites.title: US-6.1 — Confirm App Liveness via Health Endpoint

specs.title: GET /api/health returns HTTP 200 with Content-Type: application/json
The response body is exactly {"status":"ok"}

suites.title: US-9.1 — App Renders Inside an Embedded Preview Iframe

specs.title: HTTP responses do not include an X-Frame-Options header
next.config.mjs exists at the project root; next.config.ts does not exist
